rejected_paths.invariant: INV-P2: stub SingleCandidate(Coupling) → Cohesion binding reject
rejected_paths.name: AxisMismatch (SingleCandidate stub, yanlış axis binding)

rejected_paths.invariant: INV-P2/INV-P3: MultipleCandidates aday dışı axis reject (PR36 sıkılaştırma)
rejected_paths.name: AxisNotInCandidates (MultipleCandidates stub, listede olmayan axis)

rejected_paths.invariant: INV-P2: template önermeyen stub bind edilemez
rejected_paths.name: TemplateNotSuggested (NoTemplateMatch stub, boş suggested_templates)

rejected_paths.invariant: INV-C3: Candidate (Accepted olmayan) → task genesis reject. Promote OperatorAcceptance ister (pub(crate)).
rejected_paths.name: NotAccepted (Candidate TaskCandidate, promote edilmemiş)

rejected_paths.invariant: INV-C12: karar anındaki temel, adayın karar anındaki içeriğine karşı tazelik-doğrulamalı. StaleBasis tam kanıt review.rs::review_session_stale_basis_rejects_touctou unit test'inde.
rejected_paths.name: StaleBasis / NotFound (INV-C12 TOCTOU — node değişti veya yok)

rejected_paths.actual_error_variant: NotPromotableFrom (Accepted/Deprecated/Rejected → accept/reject reddedilir; diriltme ayrı mekanizma)
rejected_paths.invariant: INV-C13 + NotPromotable: Accepted/Deprecated/Rejected durumundan accept/reject geçilemez. Tam kanıt review.rs::review_session_not_promotable_rejects_accepted_node unit test'inde.
rejected_paths.name: NotPromotable (Accepted/Rejected node → tekrar accept denemesi)

subtitle: A gate that only passes is indistinguishable from no gate. These paths prove the gates reject.
summary: Six rejected paths prove the gates are real: a gate that only passes is indistinguishable from no gate. Paths 1-4 integration test'te, paths 5-6 (Faz 8a INV-C12/C13) review.rs unit test'lerinde tam kanıtlandı. Compile-time tarafı trybuild'lerde (22 test kümülatif).
thesis: Kapıların varlığını gösteren şey reddedilen yoldur.
title: Paper 3 — End-to-End Rejected Paths Replay
